metadata.name: Terminal command workspace operation (valid)
metadata.description: Conformance fixture: a terminal command operation that declares all side effects, emits terminal.command.evidence, and participates in the operation lifecycle. TurtleTerm integration target.

steps.name: emit-policy-gate
steps.run: sourceosctl workspace-ops policy-gate record --operation-id op-001 --policy sourceos.terminal.admission --result allow

steps.name: run-terminal-command
steps.run: sourceosctl workspace-ops terminal-command run --operation-id op-001 --session-id sess-001 --command pixi --args 'run lint' --cwd ~/dev/myproject --side-effects filesystem

steps.name: emit-terminal-command-evidence
steps.run: sourceosctl workspace-ops evidence emit --operation-id op-001 --kind terminal.command.evidence --command-id cmd-001
